overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Franklin walking through downtown Los Santos on a sunny day. The character navigates city sidewalks, crosses multiple street intersections, and passes various pedestrians and vehicles including a FedEx truck in a modern urban environment with glass skyscrapers and palm-lined streets.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial city sidewalk with billboards and storefronts

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk approaching an intersection, passing street lamps and commercial buildings

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving down the street parallel to the sidewalk
person walking a dog on the sidewalk ahead of the character

entered.detail: large digital billboard displaying cyan AT&T TV NOW advertisement mounted on metal structure
group of tall modern skyscrapers with reflective blue glass facades dominating the skyline
low-rise red brick building with ground floor storefronts and blue awnings
decorative black cast iron street lamp post with classical design

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a commercial city sidewalk with the AT&T billboard visible on the left and modern glass skyscrapers rising in the distance. The street has light traffic with a black SUV passing by, and a pedestrian walking a dog appears ahead on the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: character steps off the sidewalk curb and begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
character reaches the opposite curb and steps back onto the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: crossing the street at a marked crosswalk while navigating around other pedestrians, then continuing along the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: woman in yellow top and dark pants crossing the street in the same direction
white SUV driving through the intersection

entered.detail: multi-story residential building with green painted facade and balconies
tall traffic signal pole with red light illuminated at the intersection corner

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the street at a busy intersection, moving from the commercial sidewalk to the opposite side. A woman in yellow crosses alongside, and a white SUV passes on the street. The traffic light shows red for vehicles. New buildings come into view including a green apartment complex on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined avenue with mixed residential and commercial buildings

events.description: character crosses another street intersection with yellow tactile paving
white FedEx delivery truck passes by on the street to the right
character steps into street with large white STOP painted on asphalt, beginning another crossing

agents.ego_description: walking along a palm-tree lined sidewalk, passing a FedEx truck and other pedestrians, then crossing another street marked with STOP

notable_agents.action: white FedEx delivery truck with purple and green logo driving along the street
pedestrian in gray shirt walking ahead on the sidewalk

entered.detail: white commercial delivery truck with distinctive purple and green FedEx branding
line of tall palm trees with green fronds lining the sidewalk edge
distinctive cylindrical tower building with art deco architectural style visible in the distance

segments.scene_description: The character continues through a more residential area with palm trees lining the sidewalk and an art deco tower visible in the distance. A white FedEx truck passes on the right. The character crosses another intersection with yellow tactile paving and continues past landscaped medians before approaching a final street crossing marked with large white STOP lettering on the asphalt.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a bustling downtown district that transitions from a commercial hub into a more residential, palm-lined urban corridor. It begins on a commercial sidewalk beneath an AT&T billboard and towering glass skyscrapers, passing a pedestrian with a dog as a black SUV glides by. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a busy intersection where the camera crosses the street alongside a woman in yellow, revealing a green apartment complex as traffic halts at a red light. The environment then opens into a residential area characterized by art deco architecture and palm trees, with a white FedEx truck passing on the right. Finally, the camera navigates through landscaped medians and across tactile paving before approaching a street crossing marked with large white STOP lettering on the asphalt.
